# Three.js attribution

`review_3d_viewer.bundle.js` contains code from Three.js 0.179.1, including
Three.js core, OrbitControls, and VRMLLoader. Three.js is Copyright 2010-2025
three.js authors and is distributed under the MIT License in `LICENSE`.

The exact npm package is locked in `package-lock.json` as `three` 0.179.1 with
integrity value
`sha512-5y/elSIQbrvKOISxpwXCR4sQqHtGiOI+MKLc3SsBdDXA2hz3Mdp3X59aUp8DyybMa34aeBwbFTpdoLJaUDEWSw==`.
Upstream source: <https://github.com/mrdoob/three.js/tree/r179>

Three.js VRMLLoader also includes Chevrotain 9.0.1 parser code under the
Apache License 2.0. The distribution's top-level `LICENSE` supplies those
terms, and the generated viewer banner identifies the included component.
